scripts.build:js: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const dir='src';const files=fs.readdirSync(dir).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js')).sort();const out=files.map(f=>fs.readFileSync(path.join(dir,f),'utf8')).join('\n');fs.writeFileSync('src/_bundle.tmp.js',out);" && babel src/_bundle.tmp.js --out-file script.dist.js && node -e "try{require('fs').unlinkSync('src/_bundle.tmp.js')}catch(e){}"
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
